title: A5-RX battle tank

{{Quote|I have complete faith in your ''resolve'', Sergeant Gaffa, but… your ''tank'' isn't operational and your men are ''unarmed''.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], to [[Gaffa]]|<ref name="Repel All Boarders!">{{TCWComicCite|6.18|Repel All Boarders!}}</ref>}}
The '''A5-RX battle tank''', also known as the '''A5-Recon Juggernaut''', was a smaller, specialized version of the [[HAVw A5 Juggernaut|A5 Juggernaut]], re-designed for speed and maneuverability across the battlefront. Despite its smaller size, the A5-RX was well armed, being equipped with a pair of dual [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blasters]], a rear [[Composite-beam laser|beam laser cannon]], and a dorsal spread missile turret that could fire six [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] per round. The [[Tank/Legends|tank]] was first used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and later by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], seeing action across the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].

==Description==
{{Quote|Why don't we ''depressurise'' the holding bay and let the vacuum suck that tank out as a ''battering ram''? It's heavy enough to clear the wreckage!|[[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]], to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="Repel All Boarders!" />}}
[[File:A5-RX_battle_tank.jpg|thumb|left|220px|An A5-RX battle tank and [[clone engineer]]s of the [[38th Armored Division]].]]
The A5-RX battle [[Tank/Legends|tank]]—also known as the A5-Recon, or A5-R, Juggernaut—was a much smaller variant of the original [[HAVw A5 Juggernaut]] tank. Unlike the A5 and [[HAVw A6 Juggernaut/Legends|A6]] Juggernaut models, the A5-RX was equipped with tracks instead of [[wheel]]s, which, along with its smaller size, allowed for better maneuverability on the battlefield. The A5-R had a cruising speed of 13 [[megalight]]s, and could speed up to 16 MGLT for short amounts of time. However, in spite of the A5-RX's reduced size, the tank was more heavily armed than the A5 model, including two dual [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] turrets beneath the forward [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]], which would overheat if overused. The A5-RX also had an aft [[Composite-beam laser|beam laser cannon]]—which could also overheat—and a large [[spread missile]] turret on the juggernaut's roof that was capable of firing six [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] per round, requiring a short time between rounds to reload the missile turret.

The juggernaut could hold a crew of up to five [[Species/Legends|beings]], the first being a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who steered the A5-RX during battles. The A5-RX also could seat four [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]], the first two who operated the juggernaut's forward [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] turrets, the third who controlled its rear beam laser, and the fourth who managed the tank's dorsal spread [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]]. In some models of the A5-RX, the tank's pilot could take control of its repeating blaster turrets and fire them while driving the juggernaut.

==History==
[[File:A5-RX_spread-missile_battle_platform_in_action.jpg|thumb|right|280px|An 5-RX battle platform in action]]
The A5-RX battle tank was first utilized by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], being driven by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. The A5-RX was designed for reconnaissance on [[Planet/Legends|planets]] where obstacles would often block the larger A5 Juggernauts, and was very effective in battle against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist's]] [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droid]]. During the Clone Wars, the A5-RX fought on a variety of planets across the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], including [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], and [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].

Clone engineers of the [[38th Armored Division]] modified an A5-RX tank to feature spread-missile launchers, and used it to [[Skirmish aboard the Twilight|defend]] the ''[[Twilight]]'' from [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class starfighter]] pursuers.

Later, after the Republic was reformed in to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the battle tank was used by the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. During its tenure in the Empire's army, the A5-RX was deployed on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].
